quote: True healing starts from within — and it starts with feeling heard.
paragraphs: Annette Agbontaen is a certified colonic hydrotherapist based in Barrie. She came to this work through her own experience with colon hydrotherapy — and the difference it made for her became the reason she became a practitioner.
She sees clients one at a time, in a private, well-kept clinic space. You'll talk to the same person every visit.
photoAlt: Annette Agbontaen, certified colonic hydrotherapist at Vitality Source in Barrie, Ontario
